title: Lag Prank
description: This plugin allows you to create a fake lag effect to annoy players which lasts for as long as you want it to.
body:
This plugin is for Spigot/Bukkit/Paper servers. This plugin teleports players back to where they were standing constantly when the command is run until time runs out. This mimics the effect a server's lag may have on someone.

Usage: /punish <username> <duration in seconds>
